message:
feat(messaging): add EvidenceRecord advisory, typed filter, and evidence_id tracing

Extends FABRIC control plane with:
- EvidenceRecord advisory variant for explicit evidence bundle references
- ControlAdvisoryFilter for typed advisory subscription and operator views
- evidence_id() for stable evidence tracing across advisory types
- matches_filter() for family/kind/provenance-aware filtering
- 4 additional tests (56 total, all passing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
